CVE-2020-13844.title: Arm Armv8-A core implementations utilizing speculative execution  ...
CVE-2020-13844.summary: Arm Armv8-A core implementations utilizing speculative execution past unconditional changes in control flow may allow unauthorized disclosure of information to an attacker with local user access via a side-channel analysis, aka "straight-line speculation."
